noProjectsDescription: Create a project to start managing links, expenses and income.
projectImportFileTooLarge: Project file is too large. Maximum allowed size is {{size}}.
projectImportConflictDescription: A project named "{{name}}" is already in the database. Rename the imported project or skip it.
projectImportReason.unsafe_link_url: an unsafe link URL was found
projectImportReason.unsafe_icon_url: iconCache must be empty in imported project files
projectImportReason.too_many_links: the file contains too many links
projectImportReason.too_many_tags: the file contains too many tags
projectImportReason.too_many_finance_rec: the file contains too many finance records
enterSafeHttpUrl: Enter a valid HTTP or HTTPS URL
confirmDeleteProjectDescription: All project links and finance data will be removed.
confirmResetDbDescription: All projects will be removed and replaced by one demo project.
showBudgetsHint: Turn this off if the project does not need financial tracking. Data stays stored and returns when the module is enabled again.
syncStatusRisk: There is a risk of losing data
syncStatusSafeHint: Last export was {{days}} day(s) ago. Local data is in a safe state.
syncStatusRiskHint: Data not backed up for {{days}} days - consider exporting.
syncStatusNeverExported: Database has not been exported yet - consider creating a backup.
databaseSafetyHint: Data can be lost if browser storage is cleared, the device is changed, or local storage is removed manually.
databaseOfflineHint: The advantage is privacy: data stays local and the app remains offline-first without a server.
externalLinkWarningTrigger: This imported project requires confirmation before opening external links
externalLinkWarningDescription: You are about to open: {{url}}. This project was imported from an external file. Make sure you trust the source before entering personal data on a third-party site.
trustProjectDescription: You are about to disable security checks for all links in project "{{name}}".
trustProjectRiskNoWarnings: - The system will no longer warn you before opening external websites.
trustProjectRiskTrustedAuthor: - Use this only if you received the file from a trusted author.
trustProjectQuestion: Do you confirm that you reviewed the contents of this project?
trustProjectCheckbox: I confirm that this file does not contain phishing.
